certificates.description: A set of Certificates defines for the given hostname. There can be defined up to fifteen certificates in each Certificate Map Entry. Each certificate must match pattern projects/*/locations/*/certificates/*.

name.description: A user-defined name of the Certificate Map Entry. Certificate Map Entry names must be unique globally and match pattern 'projects/*/locations/*/certificateMaps/*/certificateMapEntries/*'

map.description: A map entry that is inputted into the cetrificate map

description.description: A human-readable description of the resource.

labels.description: Set of labels associated with a Certificate Map Entry. An object containing a list of "key": value pairs. Example: { "name": "wrench", "mass": "1.3kg", "count": "3" }. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

hostname.description: A Hostname (FQDN, e.g. example.com) or a wildcard hostname expression (*.example.com) for a set of hostnames with common suffix. Used as Server Name Indication (SNI) for selecting a proper certificate.

matcher.description: A predefined matcher for particular cases, other than SNI selection

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
